subcodes.first_line: ...My name should be confined to "Abdu'l-Baha" in all writings. This is the collective name
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
